metadata.description: Submit claims in Arabic or English. When the system can verify against selected sources, you get a clear answer; otherwise your dossier is queued for human review.
metadata.keywords: fact checking, claim verification, Arabic, English, AI verification, human review, multilingual

hero.title: The future of next-generation fact-checking
hero.subtitle: Meet {brand}, the AI assistant built to verify claims with curated sources, clear limits, and human review when confidence is low.

skills.title: Discover the full {brand} toolkit
skills.subtitle: The next-level fact-checking assistant your team needs

prompts.title: Guided claim prompts
prompts.description: Structured prompts help users describe rumors, forwards, and headlines so reviewers get complete context.

outputs.title: Clear verdict outputs
outputs.description: Every reply states verified, debunked, misleading, or partial, with reasoning tied to selected sources.

response.title: Instant triage signals
response.description: See confidence in real time and know immediately when a dossier is queued for human review.

evidence.title: Rich evidence intake
evidence.description: Attach links, screenshots, and text in one thread so fact-checkers never lose the original claim.

spotlight.title: Structured verification you can trust
spotlight.subtitle: Move faster with {brand}'s claim pipeline—consistent metadata, visible confidence, and human escalation built in.

bullets.2: Human review queue when automation is uncertain

dynamicFeatures.title: Dynamic features of our fact-checking assistant

0.quote: TruthSentry helped our team triage viral claims in hours instead of days. The human queue keeps sensitive dossiers accountable.
0.name: Amira Hassan

1.quote: Clear verdict labels and source citations made it easier to explain decisions to partners who do not work with AI every day.
1.name: James Okonkwo

2.quote: We finally have one place for WhatsApp forwards, screenshots, and follow-up questions without losing context.
2.name: Fatou Diallo

faq.introDescription: Your quick guide to common inquiries and how TruthSentry fits your workflow.

0.question: What is {brand}?
0.answer: {brand} is an AI-assisted fact-checking assistant. You submit claims with evidence; the system returns a clear verdict when sources match, or queues the dossier for human review.

1.question: How does {brand} work?
1.answer: You describe a claim in chat, optionally attach links or images, and the assistant analyzes against curated sources. Verdicts include verified, debunked, misleading, or partially true, with explicit uncertainty when needed.

2.question: What skills does {brand} offer?
2.answer: Guided prompts, structured verdicts, real-time triage signals, and rich evidence intake—including text, links, and screenshots in one thread.

3.question: Which languages are supported?
3.answer: The product targets Arabic and English for the interface and claim handling. Submit claims in either language; replies follow the claim language when possible.

4.question: Is this legal or medical advice?
4.answer: No. {brand} supports verification with selected sources. Official decisions remain with qualified professionals and program operators.

5.question: What happens when the AI isn't sure?
5.answer: Your dossier enters a human review queue. You are notified when a resolution is available, according to your program email settings.

footer.tagline: Claims intake with human oversight. Verify against curated sources, with clear confidence and escalation when it matters.

preview.composerPlaceholder: Hi, how can I help you? Enter a claim to verify...
preview.assistantMessage: When a claim matches curated sources, you get a clear verdict. If confidence is low, your dossier is queued for human review with full context preserved. Ready to submit your first claim?
preview.userMessage: Can you verify this WhatsApp forward about local health guidance?

signUp.title: Create your account

signUp.passwordHint: At least 8 characters, one uppercase letter, and one number.

verify.missingEmailDescription: Open this page from sign up to verify your address.
verify.resentDescription: Check your inbox for the new code.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email and we will send a reset link.
forgotPassword.successDescription: If an account exists, a reset link has been sent.

validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters
validation.passwordUppercase: Include at least one uppercase letter

chat.subtitle: Verification assistant

examplesLines.0: Explain a dossier in simple words
examplesLines.2: Compare two versions of a story I heard
examplesLines.3: How do I send a screenshot or a link?

capabilitiesLines.0: Keeps prior messages in this thread for context
capabilitiesLines.1: Queues uncertain dossiers for human review when needed
capabilitiesLines.2: Accepts Arabic and English claim text
capabilitiesLines.3: Grounds answers in selected sources when confidence is high

limitationsLines.0: May miss nuance if the dossier lacks detail
limitationsLines.1: Does not replace official legal, medical, or administrative advice
limitationsLines.2: Does not browse the open web like a general search engine
limitationsLines.3: Responses may be delayed during high traffic

chat.privacyNote: Your chat is private and tied to your signed-in account.
chat.offline: You are offline. Messages will send automatically when you reconnect.
chat.outboxPending: {count, plural, one {# unsent message} other {# unsent messages}}

toasts.pickThread: Choose an existing thread or start a new one.

chat.imageEvidenceNote: Screenshot evidence is included in AI analysis when attached.

errors.AUTH_EMAIL_IN_USE: This email is already in use.
errors.AUTH_RATE_LIMIT_LOGIN: Too many requests. Try again in a minute.
errors.AUTH_INVALID_VERIFICATION: The verification code is invalid or expired.

errors.AUTH_EMAIL_NOT_VERIFIED: Verify your email before using chat.
errors.CLAIM_RATE_LIMIT: Too many requests. Try again in a minute.
errors.CLAIM_UPLOAD_HEIC_UNSUPPORTED: HEIC format is not supported. Use PNG, JPEG, or WebP.
errors.CLAIM_UPLOAD_FORMAT_UNSUPPORTED: Format not supported. Use PNG, JPEG, or WebP.
errors.CLAIM_UPLOAD_MIME_MISMATCH: File extension does not match the MIME type.
errors.CLAIM_UPLOAD_TOO_LARGE: Image exceeds the maximum size of 5 MB.
errors.CLAIM_UPLOAD_DIMENSIONS_TOO_LARGE: Image is too large. Maximum 4096x4096 pixels.
errors.CLAIM_AUDIO_TOO_LARGE: Audio recording exceeds the maximum size of 10 MB.
